channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Boy driving truck crashes into group of monks, killing 8 and injuring 14
item.description: Police said the boy took his parents' pickup without permission and lost control, crashing into the monks.

item.title: US will not renew trade agreement with Mexico and Canada from Trump's first term
item.description: The Trump administration announced it will not extend the USMCA, a major trade pact negotiated by President Donald Trump during his first term.

item.title: July 4th may see record-breaking heat in parts of the US
item.description: Dangerous heat combined with humidity could push heat index values between 100 and 115 degrees from the Midwest to the East Coast, forecasters warn.

item.title: Empire State Building climbers due in court Thursday
item.description: Angela Nikolau and Ivan Kuznetsov, the two climbers, now face multiple charges, police said.
